name: Wurm's Lash
outcome: [AttackerName] lashes out with [AttackerHisOrHer] long and powerful tail like a sinuous whip, battering [TargetName]'s body and forcing [TargetHimOrHer] to cry out in pain.
miss: [AttackerName] lashes out with [AttackerHisOrHer] long and powerful tail like a sinuous whip, but [TargetName] deftly avoids the terrifying strike!
statusOutcome: The crushing strike of [AttackerName]'s tail leaves [TargetName] dazed and less resistant to pleasure!
